subject: fix(themes): change Sunset dark primary from brown to deep red-orange
body:
Dark variant primary #7c2d12 (orange-900) read as muddy brown rather than
a sunset sky. Updated to #c2410c (orange-700) which is a rich, warm
red-orange that actually evokes a sunset.
